name: openEuler Application SIG
description: The Application team is responsible for the development and maintenance of common application software in the openEuler community server domain.

name: openEuler Application SIG Repository List
description: openEuler Application SIG maintains 567 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Application SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The Application team is responsible for the development and maintenance of common application software in the openEuler community server domain.. The SIG has 12 core members and maintains 567 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Application SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Application SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Application SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Application SIG maintains 567 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Application.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Application SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Application SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Lei Zhao, Senlin Xia, Kaitian Du. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
